message:
feat(demo): add mouse + keyboard shortcuts to i18n Demo (bd-iuvb.17.12.6)

Add click toggles for locale bar, scroll interactions for panel
content, and D/L/R keyboard shortcuts for RTL toggle, locale cycle,
and reset-to-defaults. Includes 9 new unit tests covering all
new interactions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
